reasoning: The control 'Secure Software Development' focuses on ensuring security throughout the software development lifecycle, which includes secure code deployment, access control, and authorization. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring that container images are scanned for vulnerabilities before deployment (k8s_image_scan_on_admission), enforcing security policies at the admission control level (k8s_admission_controller_pod_security_enabled), ensuring that RBAC is used for authorization (k8s_apiserver_authorization_mode_rbac), and enforcing least privilege access (k8s_rbac_least_privilege_enforcement). These checks collectively help maintain a secure software development and deployment environment in Kubernetes.
title: Secure Software Development
